title: phleum phleoides subsp. montanum
intro: Phleum phleoides subsp. montanum, also known as mountain timothy grass, is a subspecies of the Phleum phleoides plant, which is a type of grass native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of mountain timothy grass include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Mountain timothy grass can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
